description: An account by Barhun b. Musa ha-Taharti with Yeshua b. Isma’il and Abu Ibrahim. Around 1060. Regarding their partnership in business of redwood and silk. Nahray b. Nissim wrote several details on the right side about shipment of money. Verso: Mentions a shipment of Persian cloth, cotton, a deal with Ibn al-Tarabulsi and rosewater. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 3, #358) VMR
description_he: חשבון של ברהון בן מוסא הטאהרתי עם ישועה בן ישמעאל ואבו אברהים, כ-1060, על שותפות בעצים אדומים ומשי
